    1. name()

Interface IuNamedElement<D>

Type Parameters:
D - declaring type
All Superinterfaces:
IuAnnotatedElement, IuDeclaredElement<D>
All Known Subinterfaces:
IuAttribute<D,T>, IuField<D,T>, IuMethod<D,R>, IuProperty<D,T>, IuType<D,T>
public interface IuNamedElement<D> extends IuDeclaredElement<D>
Facade interface for a named declared by a type: a field, bean property, method, or enclosed type.
